stemHtml: In accordance with Part-FCL requirements, one of the privileges of a holder of an ATPL(A) is to...

options.a: exercise all the privileges of the holder of an LAPL(A), a PPL(A), a Sailplane Pilot Licence (SPL), and a CPL(A).
options.b: act as PIC of aeroplanes engaged in commercial air transport.
options.c: act as PIC or co-pilot of any category of aircraft engaged in operations other than commercial air transport.
options.d: act as PIC of aeroplanes engaged in multi-pilot commercial air transport.
